description: Lusha is a B2B contact data tool with direct dials, verified emails, and buyer intent, plus a Chrome extension that builds prospect lists as you browse.
overview: Lusha surfaces verified emails, direct-dial numbers, and buyer intent for sales and recruiting teams, with a Chrome extension and CRM integrations that turn browsing into enriched lists.
what_is: Lusha is a prospecting data tool that hands sales and recruiting teams verified B2B contacts, including direct dials and validated emails, drawn from a large, compliance-minded database. You can start on a free tier and pull data that feeds outbound straight away.

It fits sales, marketing, RevOps, and recruiting teams that want accurate, real-time leads with buyer-intent signals. A single prompt can assemble an enriched list, while the Chrome extension surfaces contact details on LinkedIn and company sites as you browse.

Integrations push that data into your CRM and email tools, so Lusha slots in as the contact-data source in a GTM stack. It is not a CRM or a marketing-automation platform on its own; it concentrates on high-quality data and list building.
